blockers.description: Revenue team confused about Composio availability - NOT customer-ready yet

blockers.description: Connection management UX: 3 disconnected surfaces (chat, workspace, node), no permission visibility, no search for toolkits
blockers.action_required: Tyler + Kaden to decide on connection model and ship minimum viable credential UX with Phase 1

customer_ready_note: Council of Product 2026-01-24: Composio is NOT live to customers. Revenue team needs clarification that 877 toolkits != 877 working integrations.
next_action: Meeting with Kaden: decide connection model (3-surface consolidation), define Phase 1 credential UX, unblock Kaden

top_concerns: Agent conflict resolution (multiple agents, same field) - ADDRESSED v4
previous_concerns_resolved: Agent conflict resolution - RESOLVED (v4 ConflictDetector + ConflictWarning)

handoff.notes: v6 Unified Framework ready for visual polish. Conversational setup (Option D) is primary flow. Key areas: dashboard layout, motion timing, micro-copy, empty/error states.

iteration_history.focus: Agent conflict resolution (v3 jury top concern - 9 mentions, High severity)
iteration_history.feedback_source: v3 jury evaluation - new top concern
changes: Added ConflictDetector component - Detect field conflicts during agent creation
Added ConflictWarning component - Show conflict outcomes in activity log
Resolution strategies: Priority (overwrite), Merge (append), Skip (defer)
Created V4Iteration.stories.tsx with complete conflict flow demos

iteration_history.focus: Skills Layer (Phase 3) - Reduce config friction with domain expertise
changes: Added SkillsSelector component - Select domain expertise skills
Built-in skills: RevOps Expert, Follow-up Best Practices, Deal Intelligence
Auto-discovery based on agent instructions
Added AgentFrameworkDashboard component (initial version)

iteration_history.focus: Unified Framework - Full interactive experience with all v1-v5 features

Dashboard view with metrics, quick actions, recent agents, activity feed
Agents view with search, filter, CRUD operations
Skills view with built-in and workspace skills
Activity view with complete audit trail
Create Wizard: Conversational Setup → Skills → Auth → Test → Review
Integrated all v2-v5 components into cohesive experience
Created comprehensive Storybook stories with all creative options
